name: qa-claude
description: Open-source Claude Code plugins for every QA/QC engineer using AI: web/mobile automation, test-case generation, exploratory testing, review — packaged per plugin, install once and use across projects. Commands auto-route by platform (web/android/ios) and only load the matching skill.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Domain-agnostic shared skills/commands: help, status, ask, missing-test-ids + skills commit-push/build-verify/missing-ids/help-info.

plugins.name: auto
plugins.description: Multi-platform automation for Web (Playwright) + App (Appium iOS/Android). Commands auto-route by platform and only load the matching skill: find-elements/exploratory/plan-tests/cook/run/fix/review/push-code/merge-request.

plugins.name: qa-manual
plugins.description: Manual QA: generate test cases to Sheet/xlsx (cook), plan-tests, analyze requirements, log-bug to Lark, count-cases — quality-checked, supports localized (e.g. Vietnamese) output.
